reviews.review_description: This is a good game. The maps are perfect, but that’s all I could get to because I can’t join a server, and saving colors doesn’t work nor does the tablet work but that’s probably because I’m not in a server.. or, I don’t know. SCS ready had a problem where you got stuck on the loading screen, and I uninstalled and reinstalled this game to see if I can fix it, but it didn’t. Fix your games or something. All the stars are only going to the design. I’m not trying to seem like a hater or anything, and I know that this is a very new game, but please.

! This Might Be Long. ( my honest review )
----------------------------------------
This is 1 of the best and most beautiful games i've ever played on VR, it carriers amazing quality, good FPS, and a become the monster mode.

The game was amazing for the first few seconds i've joined, looking at the sunset and the amazing quality in the jungle, the shop looks nice and really good music in there aswell.

The Abilitys To Fish While Playing a Monkey Game Is 1 Of The Most Unique Things I Have Ever Seen.

The Community.
---------------------------------
Just Amazing, I Met So Many Kind People, Many People Made Me Laugh And Have Fun, This Is Such a Great Game And I'm Happy To Play It, The Community Is Just So Much Better Than Most Gorilla Tag Fangames Which Shocks Me Still.

Looking Back At Around 11 Clips, The Community Was The Main Part Of My Playtime.

To Say The Least, This Game Is Great, And I Love The Community.

- pinko (pinkosgt/pinkofr)

Splendid game, the only real criticisms I have are with pvprey

I’d recommend adding a setting to turn off the black and white effect that appears when monsters get close, and make the survivor objectives a bit more complex

Other than that I love thisgame good job snorewire

This Game Is Great, Has Cool Gamemodes, And Tons Of Ways To Get Star Coins! An idea for this game is to add a museum somewere in lobby that has stuff from the old munkie Games like munkie, munkie miners (I think that's what it's called), and munkie deluxe! Thank you for this amazing game!
yayyy i’m a dev for thi

I started playing MKDX during Halloween of 2023 and im really happy to see how this game turned out, the community is super nice and good graphics, just also kinda sad to know that this is supposed to be the last continuation of the franchise
Best vr game it has an ACTUAL good be the monster gamemode, where the monster isnt faster than you, but it’s unfair that survivors have 3 lives. but other than that great game i love it so much!!!!!
The quality of the game was perfect and my favorite game mode was PVP￼REY please good as possible￼
What the title says ⬆️
This game is so peak you can go fishing do parkour play the best btm Gamemode ever and fight people in knockout this was really fun I hope munkie has a great future

reviews.review_title: Best munkie game of the series :)
reviews.review_description: MK:AS is an amazing game. You can play in game modes like: Pvprey (the monsters are remade!) and Knockback (At the moment). They also have a fishing system and a time trials system aswell as a shop. The cosmetics overall are pretty cool too! I hope this game gets noticed to more player and succeeds like MK:DX If you’re reading this, 10/10. I would recommend you to download this game. (or don’t if your a chud and you don’t want to have fun) Xorwire is the goat! 🐐 🤩

reviews.review_title: The game is good but servers don't work
reviews.review_description: Its a good game i just wish servers worked but everything else is fine (Other then the colors and stuff)

I played for a solid hour just on pvprey and it was pretty fun, this game is better then most gorrila tag games and I’m very glad there’s no P2W bs.
This game brings back memories from munkie deluxe also PLEASE BRING BACK MUNKIE DELUXE AND MAKE STORY 2

in my opinion I think this game is the best continuation of the entire munkie franchise
